auth_notes: Requires OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code Flow via the Constant Contact V3 Developer Portal. You must create an application to obtain a Client ID and Client Secret, and configure the Redirect URI to match your n8n instance.
rate_limits: 10,000 requests per day per account and a burst limit of 4 requests per second.
gotchas: The V3 API is strictly JSON-based and requires specific 'update_source' fields for contact modifications.
Handling contact opt-in status requires explicit 'permission_to_send' flags or the request will fail.
The API returns a 409 Conflict if attempting to POST a contact that already exists, requiring a separate PUT logic for updates.
client_must_provide: List of required Scopes (e.g., contact_data, campaign_data, offline_access)
research_notes: Implementation requires the n8n HTTP Request node using the 'OAuth2' authentication type. The Authorization URL is https://authz.constantcontact.com/oauth2/default/v1/authorize and the Token URL is https://authz.constantcontact.com/oauth2/default/v1/token. Ensure 'offline_access' is included in scopes to allow n8n to refresh tokens automatically.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Implementation requires the n8n HTTP Request node using the 'OAuth2' authentication type. The Authorization URL is https://authz.constantcontact.com/oauth2/default/v1/authorize and the Token URL is https://authz.constantcontact.com/oauth2/default/v1/token. Ensure 'offline_access' is included in scopes to allow n8n to refresh tokens automatically.
